rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors-edit
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors-write
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: studio-shortcut-registry-preferred-edit
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

rules.name: studio-shortcut-registry-preferred-write
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

always_on: Directory structure table (apps/studio, apps/docs, apps/www, packages/ui, packages/common, e2e/studio) — descriptive, no attached obligation.
Common Commands code block — usage catalog of install/dev/test/build/lint/typecheck commands, no ordering or obligation attached.
UI — import from 'ui', use `_Shadcn_` suffixed variants for form primitives — general style guidance without a crisply regex-bindable trigger.
Language — Use U.S. English everywhere — blanket tone/style guidance, not tied to a specific detectable pattern.
Studio — Pages router; co-locate sub-components with parent — architectural fact, not checkable via a single-file content/path pattern.
See studio-* skills for detailed studio conventions — redirect to existing skills, not procedural content in this document.
